Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.RestOpSession

Packages that use RestOpSession
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.arg
REST Method Argument Beans
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth
Authentication (AuthN) guards, servlet-layer filters, SPIs, and request-time helpers for juneau-rest-server.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.processor
HTTP Response Processors
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.reactive
Reactive-Streams return-type support for @RestOp handlers (opt-in, dependency-free).
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.rrpc
REST Remote Procedure Call API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.tracing
Tracing SPI for juneau-rest-server — per-request span hook backed by a caller-supplied TracerHook bean.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.freemarker
Apache FreeMarker view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-freemarker module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.jsp
JSP view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-jsp module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.mustache
Mustache view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-mustache module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.thymeleaf
Thymeleaf view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-thymeleaf module.

  • Uses of RestOpSession in org.apache.juneau.rest.server

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server that return RestOpSession
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RestOpSession
    RestOpSession.Builder.build()
     
    RestOpSession
    RestOpSession.finish()
    Called at the end of a call to finish any remaining tasks such as flushing buffers and logging the response.
    RestOpSession
    RestSession.getOpSession()
    Returns the operation session of this REST session.
    RestOpSession
    RestSession.getOpSessionOrNull()
    Returns the RestOpSession created during RestSession.run() if one has been built, or null otherwise.
    RestOpSession
    RestOpSession.status(HttpStatusLine value)
    Sets the status of the response.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server with parameters of type RestOpSession
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    RestContext.authenticate(RestOpSession session)
    Runs the effective authenticator chain for this request, folding results and applying the resolved principal/roles to the RestRequest.
    void
    RestOpInvoker.invoke(RestOpSession opSession)
    Invokes this method from the specified RestSession.
    void
    RestOpInvoker.invokeOp(RestOpSession opSession)
    Invokes this method as the main @RestOp handler from the specified RestOpSession, firing per-request observability hooks (MetricsRecorder and TracerHook) around the underlying invocation.
    protected void
    RestContext.postCall(RestOpSession session)
    Called during a request to invoke all RestPostCall methods.
    protected void
    RestContext.preCall(RestOpSession session)
    Called during a request to invoke all RestPreCall methods.
    void
    RestContext.processResponse(RestOpSession opSession)
    The main method for serializing POJOs passed in through the RestResponse.setContent(Object) method or returned by the Java method.
